purpose: deterministic replay of stable opportunity identity behavior

text: collapse internal whitespace to single spaces

expected.semantic_key: mirage|bulk_essence|manual_trade|screaming essence of greed|screaming essence of greed|buy <= 12c|12.0|none|list @ 18c
expected.opportunity_id: opp::mirage|bulk_essence|manual_trade|screaming essence of greed|screaming essence of greed|buy <= 12c|12.0|none|list @ 18c
expected.notes: run-scoped fields changed but identity remains stable

expected.semantic_key_a: mirage|bulk_essence|manual_trade|screaming essence of greed|screaming essence of greed|buy <= 12c|12.0|none|list @ 18c
expected.semantic_key_b: mirage|bulk_essence|manual_trade|screaming essence of greed|screaming essence of greed|buy <= 11c|11.0|none|list @ 18c
expected.notes: buy-plan and max-buy changes are semantic changes
alert lifecycle IDs may rotate each run; semantic_key remains canonical

replay_assertions: Given same semantic fields, semantic_key MUST be byte-identical.
Given changed semantic fields, semantic_key MUST change.
Changing only scanner_run_id/recorded_at/evidence_snapshot MUST NOT change semantic_key.
Homepage top opportunities selection MUST key on semantic_key/opportunity_id, not alert_id.
grounding: poe_trade/strategy/scanner.py currently derives item_or_market_key from source row hash and alert_id from scanner_run_id + item_or_market_key
poe_trade/api/ops.py dashboard currently sources topOpportunities from critical messages/alerts
poe_trade/cli.py best-effort derives search_hint from evidence_snapshot
schema/migrations/0029_scanner_tables.sql persists scanner_run_id and alert_id as run-scoped fields
